info.name: LMS - Student Profile
info.description: Student profile endpoints: view, update, photo upload, change password

request.description: Returns the authenticated student's full profile including program, track, and current term.

response.name: 200 OK - Profile
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 5,
    "name": "أحمد محمد العمري",
    "email": "ahmed@example.com",
    "phone": "0501234567",
    "national_id": "1234567890",
    "gender": "male",
    "date_of_birth": "2000-06-15",
    "bio": null,
    "role": "student",
    "status": "active",
    "registration_number": "ST-2024-5",
    "profile_photo": "https://www.alertiqa.edu.sa/storage/profile-photos/photo.jpg",
    "program_id": 1,
    "program_status": "active",
    "program": {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "برنامج تطوير البرمجيات",
      "code": "SDP-01"
    },
    "track": {
      "id": 2,
      "name": "المجموعة أ",
      "code": "GRP-A"
    },
    "current_term_number": 1,
    "current_term": {
      "id": 3,
      "name": "الفصل الأول",
      "end_date": "2024-06-30",
      "status": "active"
    },
    "is_confirm_user": true,
    "email_verified_at": "2024-01-10T08:00:00+00:00",
    "nafath_verified_at": null,
    "date_of_register": "2024-01-05",
    "created_at": "2024-01-05T10:00:00+00:00"
  }
}

request.description:
Update editable profile fields. All fields are optional (use `sometimes` validation).

Editable fields: name, phone, email, bio, gender, date_of_birth

response.name: 200 OK - Updated

response.name: 422 Validation Error

formdata.description: Profile photo (jpeg, png, jpg, webp — max 2MB)

request.description:
Upload or replace the student's profile photo.

Accepted formats: jpeg, png, jpg, webp
Max size: 2MB

Use `multipart/form-data` with key `photo`.

response.name: 422 Validation Error

request.description:
Change the student's password.

Requires:
- `current_password`: the existing password
- `password`: new password (min 8 chars)
- `password_confirmation`: must match `password`

On success, all other active tokens are revoked for security.

response.name: 422 Wrong Current Password
422 Validation Error (Confirmation Mismatch)
